properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh God Almighty, I need you to guide me In leading my family I want to be like You In everything that I do Make me able to make it through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord strengthen me, to be the light of this family And submit myself to him To help and support him, respect and honor him As we both raise our loving children

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You and me and our God We can make a perfect harmony because

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The family that prays together, stays together Hand in hand we trust the Lord to stand through the test of time The family that “praise together”, sings together We will lift our voices with the sweetest melody to our God Together we pray, together we build our family

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I’m just a girl, learning about this whole world I’ve been blessed my mom is always there She's teaching me how to love the Lord, To trust and know Him more I can feel the love how she cares

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I’m just a boy, I just love to play with my toys But daddy taught me better things to do I will honor my mother and my father For this is what the bible says

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You and me and our God We can make a perfect harmony because

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The family that prays together, stays together Hand in hand we trust the Lord to stand through the test of time The family that “praise together”, sings together We will lift our voices with the sweetest melody to our God Together we pray, together we build our family

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Together we pray, together we build Together we stay as a family
